flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lubbock Christian University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.9k → $28.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lubbock Christian University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.9k → $28.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lubbock Christian University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (42.9% → 51.4%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lubbock Christian University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (32.4% → 36.0%).
